Variables.Name: StreamingIndex
Variables.Description: FStreamingTexture index used by the texture streaming system.

Variables.Name: LevelIndex
Variables.Description:
Level scope index of this texture. It is used to reduce the amount of lookup to map a texture to its level index.
	  Useful when building texture streaming data, as well as when filling the texture streamer with precomputed data.
      It relates to FStreamingTextureBuildInfo::TextureLevelIndex and also the index in ULevel::StreamingTextureGuids. 
	  Default value of -1, indicates that the texture has an unknown index (not yet processed). At level load time, 
	  -2 is also used to indicate that the texture has been processed but no entry were found in the level table.
	  After any of these processes, the LevelIndex is reset to INDEX_NONE. Making it ready for the next level task.

Variables.Name: FirstResourceMemMip
Variables.Description: keep track of first mip level used for ResourceMem creation

Variables.Name: ImportedSize
Variables.Description:
The imported size of the texture. Only valid on cooked builds when texture source is not
	  available. Access ONLY via the GetImportedSize() accessor!

Variables.Name: ForceMipLevelsToBeResidentTimestamp
Variables.Description: WorldSettings timestamp that tells the streamer to force all miplevels to be resident up until that time.

Variables.Name: bTemporarilyDisableStreaming
Variables.Description:
True if streaming is temporarily disabled so we can update subregions of this texture's resource 
	without streaming clobbering it. Automatically cleared before saving.

Variables.Name: bIsStreamable
Variables.Description: Whether the texture is currently streamable or not.

Variables.Name: bHasStreamingUpdatePending
Variables.Description: Whether some mips might be streamed soon. If false, the texture is not planned resolution will be stable.

Variables.Name: bForceMiplevelsToBeResident
Variables.Description: Override whether to fully stream even if texture hasn't been rendered.

Variables.Name: bIgnoreStreamingMipBias
Variables.Description: Ignores the streaming mip bias used to accommodate memory constraints.

Variables.Name: bGlobalForceMipLevelsToBeResident
Variables.Description: Global and serialized version of ForceMiplevelsToBeResident.

Variables.Name: AddressX
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the X axis.

Variables.Name: AddressY
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the Y axis.

Variables.Name: bHasBeenPaintedInEditor
Variables.Description: Whether the texture has been painted in the editor.

Functions.Name: Blueprint_GetSizeX
Functions.Description: Gets the X size of the texture, in pixels

Functions.Name: Blueprint_GetSizeY
Functions.Description: Gets the Y size of the texture, in pixels
